## LcNvToolDriverParadigm (enum)

LcNvToolDriverParadigm enum in Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Interop.

[Vendor docs](https://aps.autodesk.com/developer/overview/navisworks-api#T:Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Interop.LcNvToolDriverParadigm)

### Values
- `ePARADIGM_FIXED` = `0`
- `ePARADIGM_SWIVEL` = `1`
- `ePARADIGM_EXAMINE` = `2`
- `ePARADIGM_WALK` = `3`
- `ePARADIGM_FLY` = `4`
- `ePARADIGM_TURNTABLE` = `5`
- `ePARADIGM_APPLICATION` = `6`
- `ePARADIGM_ZOOM` = `7`
- `ePARADIGM_PAN_LOCAL` = `8`
- `ePARADIGM_PAN_WORLD` = `9`
- `ePARADIGM_SWIVEL_WORLD` = `10`
- `ePARADIGM_ORBIT_WORLD` = `11`
- `ePARADIGM_ZOOM_BOX` = `12`
- `eNUM_PARADIGMS` = `13`

## LcOaViewerRedrawType (enum)

LcOaViewerRedrawType enum in Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Interop.

[Vendor docs](https://aps.autodesk.com/developer/overview/navisworks-api#T:Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Interop.LcOaViewerRedrawType)

### Values
- `eREDRAW_WINDOW` = `1`
- `eREDRAW_UPDATE` = `2`
- `eREDRAW_USER_RENDER` = `2`
- `eREDRAW_USER_RENDER_MODEL_SPACE` = `2`
- `eREDRAW_OVERLAY_RENDER_MODEL_SPACE` = `2`
- `eREDRAW_INTERRUPT` = `4`
- `eREDRAW_EXPECTED` = `8`
- `eREDRAW_RESIZE` = `16`
- `eREDRAW_OVERLAY` = `32`
- `eREDRAW_OVERLAY_RENDER` = `32`

## LcUCIPExecutionContext (enum)

### Values
- `eUNKNOWN` = `0`
- `eCOMMANDLINE` = `1`
- `eSCRIPT` = `2`
- `eDIALOG` = `4`
- `eMENU` = `8`
- `eTOOLBAR` = `16`

- `ePANEL` = `64`

- `eBROWSERBAR` = `256`

- `eRIBBON` = `1024`
- `eAUTOCAM` = `2048`
- `eMARKINGMENU` = `4096`

## LcUSQLiteConnectionOpenMode (enum)

LcUSQLiteConnectionOpenMode enum in Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Interop.

[Vendor docs](https://aps.autodesk.com/developer/overview/navisworks-api#T:Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Interop.LcUSQLiteConnectionOpenMode)

### Values
- `eREADONLY` = `1`
- `eREADWRITE` = `2`
- `eCREATE` = `4`
- `eDELETEONCLOSE` = `8`
- `eEXCLUSIVE` = `16`
- `eAUTOPROXY` = `32`
- `eMAINDB` = `256`
- `eTEMPDB` = `512`
- `eTRANSIENTDB` = `1024`
- `eMAINJOURNAL` = `2048`
- `eTEMPJOURNAL` = `4096`
- `eSUBJOURNAL` = `8192`
- `eMASTER_JOURNAL` = `16384`
- `eNOMUTEX` = `32768`
- `eFULLMUTEX` = `65536`
- `eSHAREDCACHE` = `131072`
- `ePRIVATECACHE` = `262144`
- `eWAL` = `524288`

## LcUSQLiteStatus (enum)

LcUSQLiteStatus enum in Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Interop.

[Vendor docs](https://aps.autodesk.com/developer/overview/navisworks-api#T:Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Interop.LcUSQLiteStatus)

### Values
- `eCONNECTION_NULL` = `-1`
- `eOK` = `0`
- `eERROR` = `1`
- `eINTERAL` = `2`
- `ePERMISSION` = `3`
- `eABORT` = `4`
- `eBUSY` = `5`
- `eLOCKED` = `6`
- `eNOMEM` = `7`
- `eREADONLY` = `8`
- `eINTERRUPT` = `9`
- `eIOERR` = `10`
- `eCORRUPT` = `11`
- `eNOTFOUND` = `12`
- `eFULL` = `13`
- `eCANTOPEN` = `14`
- `ePROTOCOL` = `15`
- `eEMPTY` = `16`
- `eSCHEMA` = `17`
- `eTOOBIG` = `18`
- `eCONSTRAINT` = `19`
- `eMISMATCH` = `20`
- `eMISUSE` = `21`
- `eNOLFS` = `22`
- `eAUTH` = `23`
- `eFORMAT` = `24`
- `eRANGE` = `25`
- `eNOTDATABASE` = `26`
- `eROW` = `100`
- `eDONE` = `101`
